description.ko: 회전하는 유리 조리개가 흰 빛을 빠른 무지개 카우스틱과 순수한 프리즘 에너지로 굴절시킵니다.
description.en: A spinning glass aperture refracts white radiance into fast rainbow caustics and pure prismatic energy.

prompt: PRISM-2 light refraction study in a bright white void: a weightless circular aperture built from ultra-clear beveled glass wedges is captured mid-spin around a vertical column of pure white radiance. The rotating facets shear the light into fast radial slivers, curved rainbow caustics, and razor-thin chromatic aberration trails, with #FF0080 magenta arcs, #00FF80 mint flashes, #8000FF violet edges, and #FFFF00 yellow hotspots crossing through the transparent glass. Low sparse particles only, polished optical clarity, luminous high-key atmosphere, energetic motion blur on the refracted spectrum, crisp internal reflections, pure rainbow energy suspended in air.
